title: Diffusion Models explained..
summary: Caleb Writes Code and Julia Turc explain diffusion models, covering their progression, strengths, weaknesses, and implementation details. The video clarifies that diffusion is a process and framework rather than a fixed architecture, and can be implemented with transformers such as DiT.
